input.content: Moved session cleanup job logic into internal/session package. Added exported constructor NewSessionConnectionCleanupJob. Updated controller to use session.NewSessionConnectionCleanupJob. Updated tests accordingly. Replaced old session_cleanup_job.go/test with minimal stubs to avoid duplicate symbols. Added new files session/session_cleanup_job.go and test. Updated imports and package names.

part.text:
Implemented session cleanup job relocation:
- Created `internal/session/session_cleanup_job.go` with full logic and exported constructor.
- Created corresponding tests in `internal/session/session_cleanup_job_test.go`.
- Updated controller to use the new exported constructor.
- Replaced old controller-side files with minimal stubs to avoid duplicate definitions.
- Updated imports and package names accordingly.
